name: permission-deny-via-hook
description: Complement to scenario 05: in default permissionMode the static rule layer is permissive (no allowed/disallowed lists), so the decision falls to the permission_request hook chain. A scenario-registered hook returns deny, the resolver short-circuits BEFORE pre_tool, the harness emits a synthetic tool_result with the deny reason, and the LLM produces text instead. Pins the dynamic-deny path that scenario 05 doesn't cover (because dontAsk short-circuits at the static layer).
